other.name: Master Chronomancer
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

other.name: The Stars Are Right
other.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, triple the Attacks and Strength characteristics of this model’s Staff of Tomorrow and every successful Wound roll made for this model’s attacks scores a Critical Wound.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Staff of Tomorrow.

other.name: Grand Strategist
other.description: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

other.name: Lord of the Storm
other.description: Once per battle, at the end of your Command phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of this model: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Gauntlet of Fire; Staff of the Destroyer.

other.name: Illuminor
other.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly NECRONS units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

other.name: Mechanical Augmentation (Aura)
other.description: While a friendly NECRONS BATTLELINE unit is within 3" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and each time an attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

other.name: Atomic Energy Manipulator
other.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if this model destroyed one or more models this phase, until the end of the battle, add 3" to the range of its Mechanical Augmentation ability (to a maximum of 12").

composition.equipment: equipped with: Eldritch lance; Impaling legs.

other.name: Ancient Collector
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, at the end of your Command phase, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at start or end of any turn.

other.name: Surrogate Hosts
other.description:
At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one other friendly NECRONS INFANTRY CHARACTER model on the battlefield (excluding SKORPEKH LORD or EPIC HERO models). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and this model is put
in its place, with all of its wounds remaining (if the selected model was leading a unit, this model now attaches to that unit as its Leader).

composition.equipment: equipped with: Empathic Obliterator.

other.name: Adaptive Strategy
other.description: This model's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

other.name: Engrammatic Logic
other.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly NECRONS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Relic gauss blaster.

other.name: United In Destruction
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

other.name: Crimson Harvest
other.description: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Enmitic annihilator; Flensing claw; Hyperphase harvester.

other.name: Destroyer Cult
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodifed Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

other.name: Driven by Hatred
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

other.name: Nanoscarab amulet
other.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Lord's blade; Staff of light.

other.name: Carrier Wave (Aura)
other.description: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

other.name: Advanced Quantum Shielding
other.description: Each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this model’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

other.name: Resurrection orb
other.description: Once per battle, at the end of any phase, select one friendly NECRONS INFANTRY or NECRONS MOUNTED unit within 6" of the bearer and resurrect that unit. When you do, that unit’s Reanimation Protocols are activated reanimating D6 wounds instead of D3 when doing so. You cannot resurrect more than one unit per turn.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Gauss cannon; Tesla cannon; Staff of light; Overlord's blade.

other.name: Implacable Resilience
other.description: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from that attack’s Damage characteristic.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Voidscythe; Staff of light; Overlord's blade; Tachyon arrow.

other.name: Rites of Reanimation
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

other.name: Technomancer
other.description: At the end of your Movement phase, select one friendly NECRONS model within 6" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Staff of light.

other.name: Nightmare Shroud (Aura)
other.description: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 6" of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the roll when it does so.

other.name: Harbinger of Despair
other.description: Once per turn, at the start of your Command, Movement, Shooting, Charge or Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the roll when it does so.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Abyssal lance.

other.name: Timesplinter Mantle
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

other.name: Chronometron
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 5". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Chronomancer's stave.

other.name: Harbinger of Destruction
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodifed Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

other.name: Living Lightning
other.description: In your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this model) and roll four D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Plasmic lance.

other.name: Their Number is Legion
other.description: Each time this unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate, you can re-roll the dice to see how many wounds are regenerated.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Gauss flayer; Close combat weapon; Gauss reaper; Close combat weapon.

other.name: Implacable Eradication
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon.
equipped with: Gauss blaster; Tesla carbine; Close combat weapon.

other.name: Nanoscarab Reanimation Beam (Aura)
other.description: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 3" of this model, each time that unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate, that unit reanimates an additional D3 wounds.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Atomiser beam; Reanimator's claws.

other.name: Inescapable Death
other.description: Once per turn, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase. In addition, each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 2+.

other.name: Multi-threat Eliminator
other.description: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly NECRONS unit within 3" of a model with this ability, after that enemy has shot, one model with this ability that is within 3" of that target can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Enmitic disintegrator pistols.

other.name: Dispersion Shield
other.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

other.name: Guardian Protocols
other.description: While a NOBLE model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

other.name: Hyperspace Hunters
other.description: Once per turn, in the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves within 18" of and visible to this unit, this unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must only target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Synaptic disintegrator; Close combat weapon.
equipped with: Synaptic disintegrator; Close combat weapon.

equipped with: Flayer claws.

other.name: Bound Creation
other.description: While this unit is in the same unit as a CRYPTEK model, that CRYPTEK model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

other.name: Systematic Vigour
other.description: Each time a CRYPTOTHRALL model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and it is then removed from play.

other.name: Cryptek Retinue
other.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a CRYPTEK model (a unit cannot have more than one CRYPTOTHRALLS unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that  Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Scouring eye; Scythed limbs.
equipped with: Scouring eye; Scythed limbs.

other.name: Whirling Onslaught
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If this unit made a Charge move this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Skorpekh hyperphase weapons.
equipped with: Skorpekh hyperphase weapons.

other.name: Targeting Relay
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Stalker's forelimbs; ➤ Heat ray - dispersed; ➤ Heat ray - focused; Particle shredder; Heavy gauss cannon array.

other.name: Grand Illusion
other.description: If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**NECRONS^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

other.name: Lord of Deceit (Aura)
other.description: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Cosmic insanity; Golden fists.

other.name: Atavistic Instigation
other.description:
Each time this model targets an enemy unit with its heavy death ray, your opponent must declare if that unit will stand firm or duck for cover:
■ If it stands firm, when resolving attacks against that unit this phase, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
■ If it ducks for cover, until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

other.description: Once per battle round, when a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit within 3" of the bearer activates its Reanimation Protocols, the bearer can use this ability. If it does, that unit reanimates 1 additional wound.

other.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one friendly ^^**Canoptek^^** unit within 3" of the bearer’s unit. Until the end of the phase, improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Atomiser beam; Claws; Tesla caster; Claws; Claws; Gauss scalpel; Claws.

other.name: Weapon Sentinels
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll.

other.name: Canoptek Retinue
other.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a ^^**Cryptek^^** model (a unit cannot have more than one ^^**Tomb Crawlers^^** unit joined to it and cannot have both a ^^**Tomb Crawlers^^** and a ^^**Cryptothralls^^** unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

other.name: Tectonic Reverberations
other.description: In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

other.name: Obelisk Node Control
other.description: While this model is within range of an objective marker you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ Tremorglaive - reverberating beam; ➤ Tremorglaive - shock wave pulse; Tremorglaive.

other.name: Protective Disciples
other.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

other.name: Infectious Murder‑madness (Aura)
other.description: While a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit (excluding ^^**Monster**^^ and ^^**Titanic^^** units) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, if that model has the ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** keyword or that enemy unit is the closest eligible target, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

other.name: Prophet of Destruction
other.description: Each time this model destroys an enemy unit, select one other friendly ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** unit within 9" of it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

other.name: Nullstone Field Generator (Aura)
other.description: While a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Blade tail and whip coils; Enmitic disintegrators; Unmaker gauntlet.

other.name: Implacable Resistance
other.description: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
